<div class="viewcode-block" id="create_epub_from_markdown_files">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#text2epub.create_epub_from_markdown_files">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">create_epub_from_markdown_files</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_paths</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Sequence</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Create an EPUB from an explicit list of Markdown files.</span>

<span class="sd">    The supplied order is the EPUB spine order. Use this helper when your</span>
<span class="sd">    application already knows the chapter files and should not rely on folder</span>
<span class="sd">    discovery. Metadata may come from the first file&#39;s front matter when</span>
<span class="sd">    ``metadata`` is omitted or fields are left empty.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">MarkdownChapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapter_paths</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;create_epub_from_markdown_files requires at least one file.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">book</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">MarkdownBook</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">metadata</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">options</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">(),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">create_epub_from_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="create_epub_from_markdown_folder">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#text2epub.create_epub_from_markdown_folder">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">create_epub_from_markdown_folder</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">input_dir</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">pattern</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;*.md&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Create an EPUB from Markdown files discovered in a folder.</span>

<span class="sd">    Direct children matching ``pattern`` are sorted by filename by default. This</span>
<span class="sd">    supports simple manuscript folder conventions such as</span>
<span class="sd">    ``00-front-matter.md``, ``01-introduction.md`` and ``02-chapter.md``. Set</span>
<span class="sd">    ``recursive=True`` to sort matching files by relative path.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">discover_markdown_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">input_dir</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">pattern</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">pattern</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">recursive</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">recursive</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">book</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">MarkdownBook</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">metadata</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">options</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">(),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">create_epub_from_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="create_epub_from_markdown">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#text2epub.create_epub_from_markdown">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">create_epub_from_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">MarkdownBook</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">rendered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">prepare_markdown_book</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">book</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">create_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rendered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rendered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rendered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">options</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">assets</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">rendered</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">assets</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">compose_spine_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Sequence</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the EPUB spine, optionally prefixed by generated front matter.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">existing_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">existing_hrefs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">generated</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_title_page</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">title_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">unique_generated_value</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;title-page&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">existing_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">existing_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">title_href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">unique_generated_value</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Text/title-page.xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">existing_hrefs</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">existing_hrefs</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title_href</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">generated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">title_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">title_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Title Page&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">body_xhtml</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">build_title_page_body</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_toc_page</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">toc_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">unique_generated_value</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;table-of-contents&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">existing_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">existing_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">toc_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">toc_href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">unique_generated_value</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;Text/table-of-contents.xhtml&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">existing_hrefs</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">generated</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">toc_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">toc_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Table of Contents&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">body_xhtml</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">build_toc_page_body</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">toc_href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">toc_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
                    <span class="n">include_page_numbers</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">toc_page_numbers</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">generated</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_title_page_body</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build the generated reader-visible title page body.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s1">&#39;&lt;section class=&quot;title-page&quot; epub:type=&quot;titlepage&quot;&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  &lt;h1&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;Untitled&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&lt;/h1&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">description</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;  &lt;p class=&quot;subtitle&quot;&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">description</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&lt;/p&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">creator_names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">author_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">author</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">author</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">creators</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">creator_names</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;  &lt;p class=&quot;creator&quot;&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">creator_names</span><span class="p">))</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&lt;/p&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">publisher</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;  &lt;p class=&quot;publisher&quot;&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">publisher</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&lt;/p&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">date</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;  &lt;p class=&quot;date&quot;&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">date</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&lt;/p&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rights</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;  &lt;p class=&quot;rights&quot;&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rights</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&lt;/p&gt;&#39;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;/section&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lines</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">build_toc_page_body</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Sequence</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">toc_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">include_page_numbers</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build a generated reader-visible table of contents body.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">class_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;reader-toc with-page-numbers&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">include_page_numbers</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;reader-toc&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_lines</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">relative_href</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">toc_href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_lines</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;    &lt;li&gt;&lt;a href=&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&quot;&gt;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&lt;/a&gt;&lt;/li&gt;&#39;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s1">&#39;&lt;nav class=&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">class_name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s1">&quot; epub:type=&quot;toc&quot;&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;  &lt;h1&gt;Table of Contents&lt;/h1&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;  &lt;ol&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_lines</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">  &lt;/ol&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&lt;/nav&gt;&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">author_name</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">author</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">object</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">getattr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">author</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">isinstance</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">name</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">author</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">unique_generated_value</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">base</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">base</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rsplit</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;.</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">stem</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">suffix</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
    <span class="k">while</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stem</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="si">}{</span><span class="n">suffix</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">existing</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">candidate</span>
        <span class="n">index</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="create_epub">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#text2epub.create_epub">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">create_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Sequence</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">assets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Sequence</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">RenderedAsset</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;create_epub requires at least one XHTML chapter.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">resolved_options</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">options</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">resolved_assets</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">assets</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="n">content_chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">identifier</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_identifier</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">identifier</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identifier</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">modified</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">modified_timestamp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">spine_chapters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">compose_spine_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">stylesheet_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">compose_stylesheet</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">stylesheet_present</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">stylesheet_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">generated_text_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">MIMETYPE_ENTRY</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">MIMETYPE_VALUE</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">CONTAINER_ENTRY</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">container_xml</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)),</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">spine_chapters</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">stylesheet_href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stylesheet_present</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">stylesheet_href</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">relative_href</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Styles/book.css&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_document</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">render_xhtml_document</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">body_xhtml</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">stylesheet_href</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">stylesheet_href</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">entry_name</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;OEBPS/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">generated_text_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">entry_name</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter_document</span>
        <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry_name</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">nav_document</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_nav_document</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">generated_text_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">NAV_ENTRY</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">nav_document</span>
    <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">NAV_ENTRY</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nav_document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)))</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_ncx</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">ncx_document</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_ncx_document</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">content_chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">identifier</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identifier</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">generated_text_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;OEBPS/toc.ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ncx_document</span>
        <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;OEBPS/toc.ncx&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ncx_document</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">stylesheet_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;OEBPS/Styles/book.css&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">stylesheet_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">asset_items</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">asset</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">resolved_assets</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">item_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;image-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">03d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="n">asset_items</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">item_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">asset</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">asset</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">media_type</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;OEBPS/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">asset</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">asset</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">data</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="n">content_opf</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">build_content_opf</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">resolved_metadata</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">spine_chapters</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">identifier</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">identifier</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">modified</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">modified</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">include_ncx</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_ncx</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">stylesheet_present</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">stylesheet_present</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">asset_items</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">asset_items</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">generated_text_entries</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">CONTENT_OPF_ENTRY</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">content_opf</span>
    <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">PackageEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">CONTENT_OPF_ENTRY</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">content_opf</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)))</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fail_on_unresolved_tokens</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">ensure_no_unresolved_tokens</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">generated_text_entries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unresolved_token_patterns</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">result_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">write_generated_epub</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">package_entries</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">output_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">deterministic</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolved_options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">deterministic</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">validate_epub_package</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">result_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">result_path</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">compose_stylesheet</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">include_default_css</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">DEFAULT_CSS</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">css_text</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">css_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">css_file</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">css_files</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">css_file</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="n">BuildError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;CSS file </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">css_file</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> does not exist.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">css_file</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">encoding</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="n">combined</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">part</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">part</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">part</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">combined</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="kc">None</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">resolve_identifier</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubMetadata</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Sequence</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">XhtmlChapter</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">identifier</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">identifier</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">deterministic</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">seed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;|&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">metadata</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">language</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">href</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">body_xhtml</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chapters</span>
                <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;urn:uuid:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">uuid</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">uuid5</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">uuid</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">NAMESPACE_URL</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">seed</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;urn:uuid:</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">uuid</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">uuid4</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">modified_timestamp</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">options</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">BuildOptions</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">options</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">deterministic</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;1980-01-01T00:00:00Z&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">datetime</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timezone</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">utc</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strftime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;%Y-%m-</span><span class="si">%d</span><span class="s2">T%H:%M:%SZ&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">container_xml</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s1">&#39;&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;utf-8&quot;?&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span>
        <span class="s1">&#39;&lt;container version=&quot;1.0&quot; &#39;</span>
        <span class="s1">&#39;xmlns=&quot;urn:oasis:names:tc:opendocument:xmlns:container&quot;&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;  &lt;rootfiles&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="s1">&#39;    &lt;rootfile full-path=&quot;OEBPS/content.opf&quot; &#39;</span>
        <span class="s1">&#39;media-type=&quot;application/oebps-package+xml&quot; /&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s1">&#39;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;  &lt;/rootfiles&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&lt;/container&gt;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
